prompt_latex: A rectangle has perimeter $20$. What is the greatest possible area of the rectangle?
solution_latex: If one side is $x$, the other is $10-x$, so the area is $x(10-x)$. This quadratic is maximized when the sides are equal, giving area $25$.

prompt_latex: Positive numbers $x$ and $y$ have sum $14$. What is the greatest possible value of $xy$?
solution_latex: Write $y=14-x$. Then $xy=x(14-x)=-(x-7)^2+49$, so the greatest value is $49$.
